description: Consumer/edge single-GPU inference. Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. Designed for GPUs with ≥4 GB VRAM. No chip count requirement — single-chip is the intended use case.
_precision_note: FP16 is required so pre-Ampere GPUs (V100, T4, RTX 20xx) can participate without precision fallback warnings. Ampere+ runners will naturally use BF16 via allowed_precisions.
_concurrency_levels_note: Smaller than Suite A — consumer GPUs saturate at lower concurrency with a 0.5B model.
_accuracy_note: Qwen2.5-0.5B scores ~0.35–0.40 on MMLU by design (small model). The threshold detects broken quantization or misconfigured precision, not model quality.
_request_count_note: offline uses request_count (200; Qwen2.5-0.5B is fast, runtime is negligible), online uses online_request_count (300, robust p99), interactive uses interactive_request_count (150, robust p95)
